evidence.title: Spreadsheet formula pain
evidence.snippet: Operators ask for spreadsheet formula helpers.
evidence.normalized_text: Operators repeatedly ask for spreadsheet formula helpers that explain Excel formulas and fix broken spreadsheet sheets.

evidence.title: Excel formula search intent
evidence.snippet: Searches show demand for Excel formula helper tools.
evidence.normalized_text: Search snippets show Excel formula helper demand from users who need spreadsheet formulas explained and repaired.

evidence.title: Prerender SEO pain
evidence.normalized_text: Indie teams search for prerender SEO rendering fixes because bots cannot index JavaScript-heavy pages.

evidence.title: Review mining
evidence.normalized_text: Store reviews mention product gap summaries, review clustering, and workflows for finding missing features.

evidence.title: Video podcast note without link
evidence.snippet: A private note mentions video to podcast conversion.
evidence.normalized_text: A private note says users want YouTube video to podcast conversion but no source link is available.

evidence.title: Old PDF converter mention
evidence.snippet: Old forum post mentions PDF converter demand.
evidence.normalized_text: Old forum post mentions PDF converter demand and document workflow automation.
